caption: A man is seated in a recording studio, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, glasses, large over-ear headphones, and a tall, grey, textured wig. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background features a wall decorated with framed photographs and a clothing rack with a "LEE" branded item. Two logos appear on screen: one on the left says "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" and another on the right says "BOSS TALK JOY". As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking, and his facial expressions and mouth movements shift slightly between frames while he remains seated in the same position. The lighting is bright and consistent throughout the scene, focusing on the man as the primary subject against the studio backdrop.
